sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78753" key="paraske/lia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρα-σκέλια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, <sense id="n78753.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">side-tails</tr_> of a bandage, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heliod.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:48:58:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">48.58.3</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n78753.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">accessory supports</tr_> of a machine, Id.ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:49:4:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">49.4.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
